---
title: "Module 1 assignment"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
editor: visual
---

## Task 1: Git configuration

1.  Replace the placeholder **Your Name** with your GitHub username

2.  Replace **Your Email** with your email address

3.  Keep the quotes!

4.  Save the file by clicking on the **Save** icon in the Source pane or by pressing `Ctrl + S` (Windows/Linux) or `Cmd + S` (Mac).

5.  Render the document by clicking the **Render** button in the Source pane.

These will be the details that git will use to identify you when you make changes to your work.

```{r}
library(usethis)
use_git_config(user.name = "Your Name", user.email = "Your Email")
```

## Task 2: Data communication

**In the YAML header (between the three dashes at the top of the document)**

1.  Add your name as the author of this document.

2.  Render the document and fix any errors.

## Task 3: Commit & Push & Issue

-   Refer back to the instructions on the course website to complete the assignment: <https://ds4owd-002.github.io/website/content/assignments/md-01/md-01.html>
